hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '(^|/)\.env$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":".env files are protected — edit them directly in your editor"}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import json; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'additionalContext': 'Reminder: run /review-feature before pushing if you have not reviewed the changes in this session.'}}))" 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.py$' && /Users/blarr/Code/cazuela/backend/.venv/bin/ruff check "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
